display_text: Earthshaker Aghanim's Scepter: Enchant Totem becomes a ground target ability with cleaving attack. This upgrade counters positioning-dependent enemies by allowing Earthshaker to jump into the fight or escape, while also enhancing his area damage against grouped enemies, transforming him into a more mobile initiator or counter-initiator.
search_text: Earthshaker Aghanim Scepter mobility positioning cleave jump initiation counter-initiation

display_text: Earthshaker Aghanim's Shard: Reduces Fissure cooldown and adds Aftershock stuns along its path. This upgrade counters high-mobility heroes and teamfight engagements by providing additional crowd control, making Earthshaker a more persistent zoning and disruption threat in prolonged fights.
search_text: Earthshaker Aghanim Shard Fissure cooldown Aftershock stun crowd control anti-mobility zoning
